entry.title: Re: SAP BTP Trial invitation e-mails
entry.content:
Hi @ramtn, if you want to give other users access to your Trial account, they would first have to register the same way you did, thereby creating a user. You can then grant them access to your account by assigning the respective role collections to them (for ex. Subaccount Viewer).

Hope that helps.

entry.title: Restricting Access to Fiori Catalog Tiles in PFCG for Web Dynpro Applications
entry.content:
Hello,

I am looking for a solution regarding access to a Web Dynpro application. In the Fiori catalog, I have W0029 - Process Technical Object. Within this catalog, I have access to three tiles: Manage, Change, and Display Technical Object.

I’m trying to find out how to assign a single catalog to two roles: Role X, which is used for managing technical objects, and Role Y, which is only for displaying technical objects.

Is there a way to restrict access in PFCG for Role Y, so that it cannot access the tiles related to creating and changing the technical object?

Best regards and thanks!

entry.title: Table type for BUS_EI_EXTERN structure in sap mdg
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have a general doubt and just need a guidance on the same.

We want to send some table type data from ECC to CRM box via BDOC for MDG BP.

I want to push the table type related to BP.

Can i just do the table type for BUS_EI_EXTERN structure in ECC via append and consume the same in CRM bdoc FM's.

Thanks.

Regards,

Karthik S

entry.title: Re: Call of the function BAPI_RESERVATION_CREATE failed;
entry.content: The "External Breakpoint" is your friend. Set one at the beginning of the above code and then check, why the data from the JSon is not filled into ls_bapi_header?!

entry.title: Guidance to configure PM Notification status for users to un-approve notifications after approval
entry.content:
Please I need guidance to configure PM Notification User status for users to un-approve notifications after approval. 

Once a notification has been approved, our planners on occasion need to un-approve to allow them to send back to initiator so they can make improvements and learn how to make a quality notifications.

entry.title: Re: SAP EWM - Multiple Auto Pick HU Creation for Single Warehouse Order
entry.content: Great blog. Do you know if it is possible to let SAP create a new pick HU once the warehouse employee indicates the first HU is full? Currently, i think the worker has to switch manually to the second HU, whereas you would like to see the warehouse worker being sent to the destination with the full HU, and then continue the WO with the new HU. This applies of course when you are not able to customize the WOCR to such an extent that SAP knows when the HU is full or not. The warehouse employee in this case indicates if its full or not.

entry.title: Return blank value using IF () in story report
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We have a requirement to populate a field value as below in story reports:

If Field Value matches to particular value, then Return "Last Modified Date Time" else Return Blank.

I tried to achieve it using IF () Function, but system is expecting second parameter of IF () Function also as Date Time type value, not blank. 

Any assistance would be really helpful.

entry.title: Re: Need Value for Help in Adapt filter for custom field...

entry.title: Re: Long bank account number for china vendor (more than...
entry.content:
Have you already checked this KBA: 2890216 - How to Enter a Long Bank Account Number (More Than 18 Digits) for a Customer or Supplier Business Partner it seems business has found it 😎.

It refers to Recommendations of note 1585003 - How to enter a long account number which covers the case of China.

Hi,

I have also got same requirement, Could you please tell me how were you able to fetch modified material group from line item level in the USEREXIT.

entry.title: Re: Schedule Margin Key (SMK) Not Functioning/Driving Ear...
entry.content:
Hello @Carpe324 ,  I could get something from your question,  basically  SCM is used to have some cushioning period before and after production by considering the shopfloor capacity constraint also it will help us to ensure commitment to customer for online dispatch. Also, you can have opening and release period for more flexible.

Regards

Prasath

entry.title: Latest Blog update - Customer Maintenance of PO Responsible and the contact who receives CPI notice
entry.content:
Latest Blog Update 11th March 2025

We are pleased to share our upcoming new functionality from 26th March 2025, which gives you the opportunity to update your own Purchase Order Responsible Maintenance, Purchase Order Responsible Cloud and also Maintenance Responsible, the person who should receive the CPI notification.  You can also watch this video! Digital Library

From the “Home” page in SAP for Me, you need to go to the “Finance and Legal” page, “Overview” tab. 

You will only see under “Your Contacts Card”, the contacts for your company that currently hold the role of  

  1. PO Resp MT  
  1. PO Resp CL  
  1. MT Resp   

 

 

You might notice that there are three dots showing at the top right-hand side of the card. 

 

If you click on this, you will be able to see a more detailed explanation of what the card is about.  In summary, you will be able to add a role; add a contact; edit a role (add or delete); delete a contact or transfer a role to another contact 

 

You can filter on each role, and you can also sort by first name, last name, job position and email, and by ascending A-Z and descending Z-A 

 

 

Add Role 

If you click on “Add Role”, it brings up a search screen, where you can search EITHER by first name OR last name OR email address.  There will be three blue dots that circle whilst the search is in progress. 

Click on the contact you want to add the role to and then check the relevant role under Roles to Assign and then Click on “Update”.  You will now be able to see the contact in the Card with the new role assigned. This will also be assigned real time in our back-end systems. 

 

 

 

Add/Create Contact 

If you want to create a contact, go to “Add Role”, click on the “Downward Arrow” icon to the right of this, and choose “Create Contact”. This brings up a screen where you need to input the mandatory fields – First name; last name; email and job position.  Then flag the role or roles you want to assign and click on “Submit”.  There will be a confirmation message that will pop up to say your newly created contact has had a particular role assigned.  If you enter an email that already exists against a contact in our database, you will receive a warning message that you need to use the existing contact, by adding a role and choosing the email address of the existing contact, rather than creating a duplicate contact.   

 

 

 

 

 

 

Transfer 

Click on the Downward Scroll against the “Transfer” button to the right-hand side of the Contacts Card.  This will display three further actions: Let’s look first at “Transfer Role”.  You have two options here.  The first option is if the person you want to transfer the role from is staying in the company, just moving department or no longer handling the task, then flag the Role that you wish to Transfer under “Transfer which role?”.  You can then either search for an existing contact or create a new contact who will take on this role.   

 

 

 

Then you click on “Submit” 

Or the second option is: if the person you want to transfer the role from is leaving the company, then flag the “Leaving the Company” and you will get a warning message that will say you are breaking the relationship between this contact and the company, unless that contact is an S user, and then only the role would be removed.  You click on “OK” and then you click on “Submit” and you will get a confirmation message to say the relationship has been broken.  The contact how has left will no longer appear in “Your Finance Contacts” card. 

 

 

 

 

 

 Edit 

This is used for removing or adding a role. Right now, you cannot edit a contact’s name or email, but that will be coming soon in a few months.   

Click on “Transfer” then “Edit role”.  Flag the role you want to add or remove and click on “Update.” 

Note that you cannot remove a role, unless there is someone else in the company that has the same role. 

 

 

 

Delete 

This is used to delete a contact and break the relationship between the company and the contact.  This will not only remove the contact from Your Finance Contacts card but will also remove the contact from the back-end systems.  

There are two caveats to this. As previously mentioned, there must be someone else with the role assigned, and most importantly, the user must not be an S User.   

Click on “Transfer” and then “Delete Contact”.    You will first be asked to ensure that there is another person with that role.  If not, you will need to assign that role to someone else first.  Once you have confirmed “Delete”.  If the user you want to delete is an S User, then you will only be able to remove the role, but the contact will not be deleted in the back-end systems. 

 

 

 

 

 

So now, you should be able to add, edit, transfer, delete roles and create finance contacts via “SAP for Me”  

 Should you have any questions, feel free to reach out to our customer service for assistance.    

Thank you for using “SAP for Me”.    

Previous Blog

In addition to seeing all your Cloud and On-Premise Renewals in SAP for Me, you are able to submit your Purchase Order number for your On-Premise Auto Renewals digitally. Read on below to learn more details! And please also see our 1 minute videos from this link. Digital Library.

How to Submit Purchase Order information in SAP for Me

In SAP for Me (S-User required), select “Finance & Legal” Dashboard from the menu:

 

 

On the Overview tab you can find an “Missing PO Numbers” card showing if you have pending Orders to update the Purchase Order information. Click under “On Premise Maintenance” to update your orders directly from this card. You may add a Purchase Order number or advise No PO is required for a single order or multiple. Once you save and confirm your changes, you will receive confirmation that the Purchase Order has been assigned.

 

 

 

 

 

Another option to update your Purchase Order ID is under the On-Premise tab, where you can scroll down to the On-Premise Maintenance section, which lists all your On-Premise Maintenance orders.

 

 

From this card you can download the latest PO projection PDF and you may also see those orders where the Purchase Order information is missing.

 

 

 

Go to the right and click the > (View Details) button to see the Order Details for that specific order:

 

 

Here you can Provide your Purchase Order number by clicking “Provide PO Number” or indicate No PO is required for this Order.

To update multiple orders with the same PO, just click on “Manage PO Numbers” on the Maintenance card.

Please note that the update of the Purchase Order information is available 90 days before your maintenance renewals starts and will be available until an invoice is created for that period.

If the order already has a Purchase Order number and you wish to change the information, click on the “Edit PO Number” button. You can provide a new Purchase Order number or advise that No Purchase Order is required. This option is available only for single orders.

 

 

If you need help you can use the Get Assistance functionality at the top of the Your Order Details view to contact SAP and request support. To date, the functionality covers questions around the Purchase Order submission and Invoicing processes (more options to be provided later).

 

 

After selecting the Get Assistance option, a dropdown webform will appear, where you can enter your question or issue. The request for assistance in SAP for Me is forwarded to the responsible SAP Team, who will contact you directly to help you with your inquiry.

Don’t miss watching our two short video clips which provide you with an overview of Renewals in SAP for Me as well as a quick overview on how easy your PO submission can be!

PO Submission is also available for Cloud Direct Auto Renewal Contracts. Check our blog for further details: Purchase Order Submissions Just Got Easier for Cloud with SAP for Me!  

Thank you for using SAP for Me

entry.title: ToolbarItem color not changing even after applying style in SAP MDK 24.11.2-002
entry.content:
In the previous version the below style was working as expected. With new version the toolbarItem color is not changing.
 
in Styles 
#BulkApproveToolbarItem {
color: #188918;
}

"ToolBar": {
"Items": [
{
"_Type": "Control.Type.ToolbarItem",
"_Name": "BulkApproveToolbarItem",
"Caption": "BulkApprove",
"Enabled": true,
"Clickable": true,
"Visible": true
}
]
}

Please guide to resolve this issue.

entry.title: Re: Share memory between function groups
entry.content:
I know it is a very old topic, and sorry for resurrecting it, but someone (like me 😁) might still find this post nowadays while searching for a solution, or one "lucky" developer might be tasked with maintaining this code one day, so I think having a better suggestion to solve a similar problem would be helpful.

Yes, there was no solution using the data of that FG and the structure that was set up. I would not complicate things with memory assignments. A simpler solution (even available back then) would be to create "Private Class Data" objects to store all the common data you need (persisting if necessary) and then use public static SET/GET methods to access this data from any function or method you need.

Accessing global variables outside of the interface of the Form, Function or Method is always a source of potential errors and confusion. The recommended approach is that ONLY setter and getters should access data that lives outside of the present scope.

You could do a similar thing using a newly created FG with its own SET/GET FMs, but methods are far better and clearer for the task.

Of course if you had 99 FMs in your FG, it means they were not properly separated by topic or business needs. We should not try to build "mini applications" inside a Function Group, but logically separate and group all uses and needs when creating any code. That will definitely help us finding a better solution, when we face any problem.

Best regards, Eloi

entry.title: PR Document type assignment on maintenance order in S/4 HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content: Hi everyone, I have recently come across a problem where I am unable to assign PR document type to maintenance order type for generation of auto purchase requisitions. System is creating auto PRs of NB document type (standard) but I am looking to use custom PR document types which have been created in the system. This configuration was available in ECC and S/4 HANA onpremise systems but I am unable to find it on SAP S/4 HANA Cloud Public Edition. Any help here would be beneficial.

@RishabhGupta198 

May be try the else part as NULL

Hope this helps !!

Nikhil

entry.title: Re: Acquisitions and Preparation Consolidation Group Changes

entry.title: Issue with Cross-Navigation in SAP Fiori List Report
entry.content:
Course 

Hi everyone,

I've developed a SAP List Report using the SAP Fiori List Report template and implemented cross-navigation to a target app. The target app is a standard Fiori app called "Record Inspection Results."

To enable navigation, I used annotations in the CDS view and configured a tile in the SAP Fiori Launchpad. I also added the parameter "InspectionLot", which is passed during navigation.

The navigation works correctly the first time I click on an InspectionLot—it opens the target app with the correct parameter. However, when I go back to the list report and click on a different InspectionLot, the navigation still opens with the previous InspectionLot value instead of the new one.

The only way to reset this behavior is by refreshing the browser on the list report page.

Has anyone encountered this issue before? Is there a way to force the navigation parameter to update properly without requiring a manual refresh?

Any help or alternative solutions would be greatly appreciated.

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Re: **Request for Tools to Create Developer Key**
entry.content:
Hi Kiran,

1. You must obtain the access key from the SAP support portal.

2. You can check the table name DEVACCESS to see how many user IDs are being registered. From those user IDs, you can proceed with the development. 

Regards

SS

please suggest.

entry.title: Re: How to know how the upgrade was done ?
entry.content:
@raymond_giuseppi

Thank you for your answer.

  • creating a short comment then updating it – thank you.
  •  Did you find any transport request related to some subobject of CLASS (LIMU xxxx) – In DEV I found 2 transports that are not in QA. Those transport do not have log . How can I know who creates them (maybe I can ask him)?

  • Are there some Repaired Objects in quality system (check with SE03) – In DEV I see 2 repaired classes (but not  /UI2/CL_JSON).

    In QA I do not see any repaired classes

     

    thank you

Soma

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud Planning : Advance Formulas (Aggregation)
entry.content:
Hi @SANA11

The meaning of "the calculation is performed row-wise first and then aggregated," seems to be below the calculation,

       105,082.00*10=                 1,050,820.00
       178,510.00*12=                 2,142,120.00
             9,459.00*8=                        75,672.00
                                                 -  
       891,634.00*35=              31,207,190.00
       243,333.00*30=                 7,299,990.00
     
  Aggregate Total:                41,775,792.00

 

What do you want to get your expected results  "I want to first aggregate the values by Product and Time and then perform the multiplication to ensure accuracy. "?

Is the below calculation? 

       105,082.00 10  
       178,510.00 12  
             9,459.00 8  
     
       891,634.00 35  
       243,333.00 30  
     
   1,428,018.00*95=           135,661,710.00
 Aggregated Qty  Aggregate Price

When same FM is called form idoc its updating order quantity and confirmed quantity in schedule lines. where as if i call with same data and same FM it only updates order quantity but not confirmed quantity.

 

can you please suggest here.

 

Regards

Mamata

entry.title: Re: Long bank account number for china vendor (more than...

entry.title: Re: Long bank account number for china vendor (more than...
entry.content:
There's nothing to set up, it's already the way it's supposed to work.

  • Where are you stuck, what have you tested?
  • You need to test a payment until the payment support/xml file is generated to make sure the bank account in that file is correct.
  • If you're lucky, you won't have to do anything, otherwise you may have some notes to identify and implement.

entry.title: To display content in book page without SAP Companion
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We have the below query from one of our teams, can you please let me know whether this is possible,

I have a book page named as Learning Center which get displayed in SAP Companion and when navigated to the screen, the contents can be filtered on role based. Can you please let me know whether I will be able to view this book page (Learning Center) without SAP Companion.

Also, is it possible to display a book page that can be filtered on role based by writing a source code for book page in Manager -> ZF properties -> Course Objective section and view the book page on role based without SAP Companion.

Thank you in advance!

Warm regards,

Anisha S

entry.title: Re: Syntax error in program SAPLCMD_BTE_OUTBOUND
entry.content:
• Did you check for pre-requisite notes or missed some manual activities (e.g. run report NOTE_2187463)
  • What error did you get when activating the CPCC_DM function group or the CMDS_FKNBK_IBAN_TAB table type ?
  • You should do an OSS search on this FG for your exact version (once you are sure there are no 'local' changes).

Regarding " possibility to view the last logins of the users":

you can use RESOURCE model and field "Last Activity Timestamp". 

Cheers

entry.title: Issue with Cross-Navigation in SAP Fiori List Report
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I've developed a SAP List Report using the SAP Fiori List Report template and implemented intent based navigation to a target app. The target app is a standard Fiori app called "Record Inspection Results."

To enable navigation, I used annotations in the CDS view and configured a tile in the SAP Fiori Launchpad. I also added the parameter "InspectionLot", which is passed during navigation.

The navigation works correctly the first time I click on an InspectionLot—it opens the target app with the correct parameter. However, when I go back to the list report and click on a different InspectionLot, the navigation still opens with the previous InspectionLot value instead of the new one.

The only way to reset this behavior is by refreshing the browser on the list report page.

Has anyone encountered this issue before? Is there a way to force the navigation parameter to update properly without requiring a manual refresh?

Any help or alternative solutions would be greatly appreciated.

Thanks in advance!

Here is my CDS view:

entry.title: IDOC metadata issue on SAP PO
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have IDOC to proxy interface on SAP PO 7.5 single stack. IDOC structure on sender SAP ECC system got changed i.e, under segment under E1MARAM segment SAP ECC started sending MATNR_LONG instead of MATNR. What should we do from SAP PO side.. should we ask SAP ECC colleauges to share IDOC schema? then import that IDOC schema into SAP PO/PI to make the structure consistent on SAP PO/PI & SAP backend? which format SAP ECC guys should share the IDOC schema XSD or WSDL? what are the options available on their end?

 

Thanks

Ramu

entry.title: Community project: General purpose customizing table
entry.content:
Use case

If there is a need for new customizing parameters in customer projects, we usually create tables, views, view clusters, access routines and so on. What if we used one single table for this? We would have an unique access module and could store as many parameters as we want using an access key.

Real-life experiences

I used this approach for many years in a mid-range implementation with about 3000 Users. It makes the developing more straightforward when it comes to use settings stored in the database. After 4 years, about 250 different parameter keys accumulated in our generic table. In case we have special requirements such as proper validation of values against domains or check tables, we continue using normal customizing features, but in case of simple setup parameters, the generic table is very helpful.

Features

  • General customizing tables
  • Possibility to set validity dates and user ids (for testing)
  • Usage with our without change requests (customizing or non-customizing)
  • Possibility to store structure-like parameters
  • Possibility to store multi-value parameters 

Learn more on the github readme

entry.title: Re: Success factors Compensation and Bonus configurations
entry.content: Hi Xavier, I have 2 questions, pls help.I can see maximum pay range in work sheet but cant see minimum pay Range.As this column I am pulling from look up table.Look table formula is ok,4 input and 2 out put as minimum pay range and maximum pay range. second question is market bench mark field wanted to make as editable in executive review.Thanking you.

entry.title: SAP EWA automated Analysis and tracker
entry.content:
My query to Microsoft Co-pilot


I have unstructured data with dynamic information on the SAP EWA Report. Each EWA Report contains Alert Overview and alert over view points contains critical issues and recommendations. Each Critical or recommendations under alert overview will have a hyperlinks which takes you to detailed information, where SAP provides issues, findings on tabular format and also recommendations. each week EWA REport contains different issues and different recommendations. Automated EWA report and summarise the issues, findings and recommendations on tabular format using any AI Tool like Azure GenAI, Python, Github Copilot etc., wanted to leverage GENAI.

Detailed Proposal for Automating SAP EWA Report Summarization

Objective
To automate the extraction, summarization, and presentation of critical issues, findings, and recommendations from SAP EWA Reports using AI tools like Azure GenAI, Python, and GitHub Copilot.

Tools and Technologies Required
1. Python Libraries:
o BeautifulSoup: For web scraping and parsing HTML content.
o PyPDF2 or pdfplumber: For extracting text from PDF documents.
o re (Regular Expressions): For pattern matching and text extraction.
o SpaCy or NLTK: For natural language processing tasks.
o Pandas: For data manipulation and creating tabular data.
o Matplotlib or Seaborn: For data visualization.

2. Azure Cognitive Services:
o Azure Text Analytics: For entity recognition, key phrase extraction, and sentiment analysis.
o Azure OpenAI: For leveraging pre-trained language models to summarize and generate insights.

3. Machine Learning Frameworks:
o TensorFlow or PyTorch: For developing custom machine learning models.

4. Automation and Integration Tools:
o GitHub Copilot: For code suggestions and assistance in writing scripts.
o Azure Functions: For automating the workflow and scheduling tasks.

5. Visualization and Reporting Tools:
o Power BI: For creating interactive dashboards and reports.

Step-by-Step Implementation Plan

1. Data Extraction:
o Web Scraping: Use BeautifulSoup to scrape HTML content from the EWA reports if they are web-based.
o PDF Parsing: Use PyPDF2 or pdfplumber to extract text from PDF reports.
o Pattern Matching: Use regular expressions to identify and extract hyperlinks, critical issues, and recommendations.
from bs4 import BeautifulSoup
import requests
import re

# Example of web scraping
url = 'http://example.com/ewa_report'
response = requests.get(url)
soup = BeautifulSoup(response.content, 'html.parser')

# Extract hyperlinks
links = soup.find_all('a', href=True)
for link in links:
print(link['href'])

# Extract critical issues and recommendations
text = soup.get_text()
critical_issues = re.findall(r'Critical Issue: (.*?)\n', text)
recommendations = re.findall(r'Recommendation: (.*?)\n', text)
2. Natural Language Processing (NLP):
o Entity Recognition: Use Azure Text Analytics or SpaCy to identify entities and key phrases.
o Summarization: Use pre-trained models from Azure OpenAI to summarize the extracted text.
import spacy
from azure.ai.textanalytics import TextAnalyticsClient
from azure.core.credentials import AzureKeyCredential

# Example of using SpaCy for entity recognition
nlp = spacy.load('en_core_web_sm')
doc = nlp(text)
for ent in doc.ents:
print(ent.text, ent.label_)

# Example of using Azure Text Analytics
credential = AzureKeyCredential("your_key")
client = TextAnalyticsClient(endpoint="your_endpoint", credential=credential)
response = client.extract_key_phrases([text])
key_phrases = response[0].key_phrases
3. Machine Learning Models:
o Custom Models: Develop and fine-tune models using TensorFlow or PyTorch to classify and summarize the data.
import tensorflow as tf
from tensorflow.keras.models import Sequential
from tensorflow.keras.layers import Dense, LSTM

# Example of a simple LSTM model
model = Sequential()
model.add(LSTM(128, input_shape=(timesteps, features)))
model.add(Dense(1, activation='sigmoid'))
model.compile(optimizer='adam', loss='binary_crossentropy', metrics=['accuracy'])

# Train the model (example)
model.fit(X_train, y_train, epochs=10, batch_size=32)
4. Automation and Integration:
o GitHub Copilot: Use Copilot to assist in writing and optimizing code.
o Azure Functions: Automate the workflow to run weekly and process new reports.
import azure.functions as func

def main(req: func.HttpRequest) -> func.HttpResponse:
# Your code to process the EWA report
return func.HttpResponse("Report processed successfully.")
5. Visualization and Reporting:
o Pandas and Matplotlib: Create tables and visualizations to present the summarized data.
o Power BI: Develop interactive dashboards to provide insights.
import pandas as pd
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

# Create DataFrame
data = {'Issue': critical_issues, 'Recommendation': recommendations}
df = pd.DataFrame(data)

# Plot data
df.plot(kind='bar')
plt.show()

Programming Knowledge Required

1. Python: Proficiency in Python is essential for data extraction, parsing, NLP, and machine learning tasks.
2. Web Scraping: Knowledge of web scraping techniques using BeautifulSoup.
3. PDF Parsing: Familiarity with libraries like PyPDF2 or pdfplumber.
4. Regular Expressions: Understanding of regular expressions for pattern matching.
5. NLP: Experience with NLP libraries like SpaCy or NLTK.
6. Machine Learning: Skills in developing and fine-tuning models using TensorFlow or PyTorch.
7. Azure Services: Knowledge of Azure Cognitive Services and Azure Functions.
8. Data Visualization: Proficiency in data manipulation and visualization using Pandas, Matplotlib, and Power BI.

CHATGPT and COPILOT Conclusion
It is very much possible to automate the summarization of SAP EWA Reports using the tools and techniques outlined above. By following this detailed proposal and leveraging the required programming knowledge, your development team can successfully automate the process and present the information in a structured, tabular format.
Anyone has done any automation of EWA Report Analysis and tracker?

Martin Pösinger, ADP

entry.title: SAP Community Meetup Lingen
entry.content:
Calling all tech enthusiasts in the SAP world!

 Join us for an evening of networking, mingling, and tech talk at our casual after-work event! 

 Whether you're a programmer, an SAP expert, or simply tech-curious, this is your chance to connect with like-minded SAP professionals in a relaxed setting. 

 

  Date: 27.03.2025

  Time: 19.30 Uhr

 Location: Alte Posthalterei, Große Str. 1, 49808 Lingen (Ems), Deutschland

Get ready for an evening filled with stimulating conversations, and the opportunity to expand your SAP network. 

 Bring your ideas, questions, and business cards – you never know who you might meet! Don't miss out on the chance to unwind, connect, and discover new opportunities in the SAP world. RSVP now to secure your spot!

entry.title: Is it possible to do a full data refresh in a Sandbox client from a Production client?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am looking to fully refresh all data in our Sandbox system with Production data.  A key part of the refresh is to only have planning objects in the Sandbox that are in Production (so deleting any planning object that does not exist in production).  We had an issue in the early days of our system where we had bad planning objects that we have cleaned up in production but they still remain in the Sandbox.  Essentially we would like a process to mirror production into the sandbox, is there a way of doing this? 

Thanks,

Jez

entry.title: Re: How to know how the upgrade was done ?
entry.content:
Basically, your systems are not at the same service package level, so the class or some of its components are different.

It seems someone forgot or chose not to complete an upgrade a few years ago...

  • until SAPK-74012INSAPUI complete
  • SAPK-74013INSAPUI to SAPK-74017INSAPUI in progress

entry.title: Re: CDSView:Service Contract Partner Information
entry.content:
Hello,

To create a Custom CDS View for integrating information about the address and name of the partner in a Service Contract, you can use the CDS View I_CustMgmtPartner. Virtual Data Model and CDS Views - Customer Management Partner This view provides partner data for all relevant OneOrder Business objects. When dealing with a service contract, it returns the partners stored at the header and relevant item levels, including those inherited from the header.

Steps to Create Custom CDS View:

  1. Create Custom CDS View:

    • Use the ‘Extensibility’ group in SAP S/4HANA Cloud to navigate to ‘Custom CDS Views’.
    • Choose I_CustMgmtPartner as your primary data source.
    • Define associations if needed with additional data sources.

  2. Select Required Fields:

    • Add fields such as CustMgmtPartner, CustMgmtPartnerFunction, and any necessary partner address fields.

  3. Publish:

    • Ensure the new CDS View is marked for external API consumption if needed.

  4. Use in API:

    • Once published, your view can be utilized via API by setting up appropriate communication scenarios and arrangements.

By following these steps, you will be able to create a CDS View to handle integration via API for service contract partner information.

Best regards,

Dequan Xu

entry.title: Re: 🟣 Boost Development with GenAI in SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content: Where on the roadmap can we find the GenAI functionality?

entry.title: Re: Process Rating in Collaboration Hub
entry.content:
Good day rada_sereseanu,

 

Thank you for sharing your question on the SAP Community.  To provide further support in regard to your question, we recommend you create a support case using SAP for Me (log in with S-User ID and password).  

You will need to select the specific SAP Signavio product / component as shown in the example below.

 

System:  

Search for SAP Signavio   

 

Product Area:  

SAP Signavio Process Manager > SAP Signavio Process Manager  

 

Component:  

BPI (Business Process Intelligence)  

---  

BPI-PI (SAP Signavio Process Insights) or  

BPI-SIG (SAP Business Transformation Suite by SAP Signavio) – Product & Topic  

 

For further information you can find more details in the SAP Signavio Onboarding Resource Center .

 

Kind regards,

KantriceD

entry.title: Trigger CPI Integration for admin task not from ISC
entry.content:
We are investigating a way to simplify retry mechanism in SuccessFactors integrations.

we would like to know if there is a way thru integration Center to trigger CPI Integration.

Unfortunately, we have only found to do so when using Intelligent service Suite (ISC) but no option is left to trigger a cpi integration when admin task is required .

can you confirm that ? 

 

Thanks

Philippe

entry.title: Re: Sap script excel selecionar próxima linha vazia.
entry.content:
Bom dia!
Não sei se ainda precisa da resposta, mas eu estava com o mesmo problema descrito por você e consegui recentemente o código abaixo e para o meu caso deu certo.
O código eu consegui no ChatGPT e depois eu ajustei algumas coisas.



' Encontrar a primeira linha vazia para adicionar um novo e-mail
i = 0
Do While True
On Error Resume Next
Dim emailAtual As String
emailAtual = session.findById("wnd[1]/usr/tblSAPLSZA6T_CONTROL6/txtADSMTP-SMTP_ADDR[0," & i & "]").Text

' Se encontrar um campo vazio, insere o novo e-mail
If Err.Number <> 0 Or emailAtual = "" Then
On Error GoTo 0
Exit Do
End If
i = i + 1 ' Avança para a próxima linha
Loop

' Inserir o novo e-mail na primeira linha disponível
session.findById("wnd[1]/usr/tblSAPLSZA6T_CONTROL6/txtADSMTP-SMTP_ADDR[0," & i & "]").Text = Cells(linha, 2).Value '"ADM@xxxx.COM.BR"
session.findById("wnd[1]/usr/tblSAPLSZA6T_CONTROL6/txtADSMTP-REMARK[3," & i & "]").Text = Cells(linha, 3).Value '"FINANCEIRO"

Maxime

entry.title: Re: How to know how the upgrade was done ?
entry.content:
You could identify the OSS Notes that changed the class, but as your development system is already at a higher SP, you cannot implement them in that system.

So you could create a Transport of Copies request for the whole class, but first do a where-used search to make sure that no other Workbench object that uses this class will fail after the import, you would need to transport those changed objects as well, and again look for the usage case and add new objects to the request until no more objects are added.

entry.title: Issue with Transportation Route Proposal in Export Documents
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

We are currently facing the following situation:

At present, when the consignee and the ultimate consignee are located in different countries, the transportation route in an export document only reflects the departure country and the country of the ultimate consignee. The consignee’s country is not taken into account.
This means the route currently appears as: (Departure Country - Ultimate Consignee's Country).

However, if the consignee and ultimate consignee are in different countries, the route should instead be displayed as:
(Departure Country - Consignee's Country - Ultimate Consignee's Country).

We have already looked into the BAdI /SAPSLL/BADI_CDOC_PROP_N to see if this could be achieved by manipulating the header data in the data proposal logic. Unfortunately, this does not seem to be possible for the route topic.

Has anyone encountered a similar issue or found an alternative approach to solving this?

Thanks in advance for any insights!

Best wishes

Ganjos

entry.title: Can't find our code for GB Security Training in the Dynamic Business Event Menu.
entry.content:
Hi 

I am a student at Ubon Ratchathani University. I study in the Business school, majoring in Accounting, Year 2. I have taken a course that uses the SAP program. Right now, I am working on the HCM module in Step 12 Create event. When I followed the instructions as follows:

"You can see the Business Event Menu for the current plan. There, please
choose GB Training and Education  Security Training and select GB
Security Training. Then choose the menu path Menu ► Business Event ►
Dates ► Create Without Resource."

But I can't find my code, which should be '070 ST'. No matter how hard I look for mt code, I can't find it. I didn't make any mistakes in the previous steps, but now I'm stuck at step 12.

I would like to know how I can solve the problem. Please

Best regards

entry.title: SAP Sustainability Data Exchange: New Partner Resources
entry.content:
SDX Now Has a Dedicated PartnerEdge Page! 

We’re thrilled to announce the launch of SDX’s official PartnerEdge page – a one-stop hub designed to provide SAP partners with essential insights, enablement materials, and go-to-market resources. This page makes it easier than ever to position SDX in customer conversations and accelerate adoption.

📬 What You’ll Find on the SDX PartnerEdge Page:

Sales and technical enablement assets – Equip yourself with the right tools to engage customers.
Customer success stories – See how SDX is making an impact in real-world scenarios.
SDX value propositions for different industries – Tailor your approach for various customer needs.

📚Bookmark the page today and stay updated on the latest SDX developments!
👉 Visit the SDX PartnerEdge Page

🔎 Partner Learning – Empowering Our Ecosystem

Partner enablement is key to scaling SDX adoption, and we’re excited to introduce the SDX Partner Update  – a live learning session to give you the opportunity ask questions on how to successfully position, sell, and implement SDX.

📅 Date & Time: March 25, 2025 | 10:00 AM CET (GMT+1) | 🕒 Duration: 1 hour

🔑 Sign up today! 

Make sure your partners don’t miss out—share this learning opportunity and set them up for success!

SAP Sustainability Data Exchange is shaping the future of sustainability data sharing, and with these new resources, our partners are empowered to lead the way.

**************************

Jessica Bartels, Product Marketing Lead - SAP Sustainability Data Exchange

 

#sapsustainabiltydataexchange

entry.title: Re: Customer maintainance of your PO Responsible and contact that receives the CPI notification
entry.content:
hi there.

PO Responsible Maintenance is the person who will receive the Purchase Order notifications for Maintenance. These go out in September/October. Followed by 5 reminders one per month, unless you have already entered your PO information.  PO responsible Cloud is the person who will receive the Purchase Order notifications for Cloud.   

Maintenance Responsible is the person who we believe will receive the CPI notification, that occurs mid year.

A person can have have many roles eg. they can be PO Resp MT, and PO Resp CL and also MT Responsible. 

You can have multiple people in your company that can have each role.

You cannot create your own custom roles

In August 2025, we are aiming to introduce Accounts Payable and E Bill.  And at the end of the year, we will also have Main/business lead; Technical/Onboarding lead and Invoice Recipient.

i will keep the blog updated.

thanks for your interest

entry.title: Re: Planned Goods issue date in outbound delivery and Goo...
entry.content:
Hi @ttsuboi1106 ,

"Could help us to understand why Delv2 has Feb 19, 2025 in Planned GI was proposed in outbound delivery instead of Feb 18, 2025?" - > System is not copied due to various factors influence example I guess system see requested delivery then calculate forward/ backward... Please see the link below for the details and let us know if any further questions. 

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/c7894a248ca14f74aca67f97528e5ad7/9dbdba53422bb54ce10000000a174cb4.html

If you still wants influence as per your need, then you have to do with enhancement.

Kind Regards,

Ajit

entry.title: Usage of Quantity Based- Inspection Point in Public Cloud
entry.content:
Dear All,

We have requirement of customer i.e. they will check the quality parameters of 2 pipes of each 100 pipes produced/manufactured during Inprocess Inspection, we have tried with Inspection Point but found that Quantity Based - Inspection Point is not available in Public Cloud.

How can we achieve the same it Public Cloud or if any alternative rather than Inspection Point to check this point of Quality.

Please Help 

 

Thanks and regards,

Raj Tilak

entry.title: Re: Logical Port Operation not updating
entry.content:
We have a simular issue on our ECC system...Development all good but once in production, the new operations are visible in Design Time but not updated in Runtime.

Did you manage to solve the issue?

entry.title: Unable to find the Solution to Check Quality Parameter in Public Cloud
entry.content:
Dear All,

The customer's requirement is that whenever 100 units are produced, a quality check must be performed on 2 pieces. For example, if the lot size is 800, the system should give provision to record results of 4 separate samples, each containing 2 pieces.

We tried using the Sampling Scheme, but the system is allowing inspection of all 8 pieces within a single inspection lot instead of generating separate samples.

I believe this can be achieved using Quantity-Based Inspection Points, but this functionality is not available in SAP Public Cloud.

Does anyone know how to configure this in Public Cloud or suggest an alternative solution?

 

 

Please Help

 

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Delay Learning Assignments
entry.content: Is there any movement on this? I also have a request to assign a specific item to new hires 90 days after they start

entry.title: Re: Rewards & Recognition: Guidelines formula
entry.content:
Hi @analousada - So the guidelines provide the various amounts based on the selected categories/levels. If we wanted to have this guideline amount or any manually entered amount by the nominator to be a % of salary, then this will also work.

In the end, the initial nominated award amount is 2 but we are changing this amount to be current salary multiplied by 2. We can adjust the rule to be from the amount amount rather than guideline.

Thanks!

entry.title: 🇨🇭 Event-driven integrations with SAP Integration Suite, AEM (Risch-Rotkreuz, Switzerland)
entry.content:
This SAP CodeJam instance will be about Event-driven integration using SAP Integration Suite, advanced event mesh. Join us for this 5-hour event of developer networking and hands-on learning in Risch-Rotkreuz, Switzerland.

We will achieve an integration scenario like the one in the diagram below by the end of the CodeJam.

If you are interested in knowing what we will develop during the event, check out the Event-Driven Integrations with SAP Integration Suite, Advanced Event Mesh GitHub repo -  https://github.com/SAP-samples/event-driven-integrations-codejam. The repository contains the details of the integration scenario we will go through during the event.

This free, hands-on, in-person event (not virtual) will take place on Thursday, May 23rd 2025, in Risch-Rotkreuz, Switzerland at GAMBIT Consulting AG office (8th floor) .

The instructors for this event are Developer Advocate @ajmaradiaga and @Dan_Wroblewski . 

There are essential prerequisites that every attendee must complete before arriving at the event location. You can find the prerequisites here: https://github.com/SAP-samples/event-driven-integrations-codejam/blob/main/prerequisites.md.

If you wish to attend, please indicate that using the "Yes" button in the Will you be attending? box on this page.

Location: Gambit Consulting AG, Suurstoffi 22, 6343 Risch-Rotkreuz, Switzerland (8th floor)

entry.title: Re: how to connect to ibm db2 as400 iseries using jt400.jar

entry.title: Import multiple bpmn to SAP Signavio
entry.content: I need to migrate .bpmn diagrams from another tool to SAP Signavio; however, I can't find an option to do it in bulk. Do I really have to upload them one by one?
